mapper.insert: INSERT INTO payment (user_id, provider, product_type, product_code, order_id, payment_key, amount, plan, credit_amount, policy_snapshot_json, status) VALUES (#{userId}, #{provider}, #{productType}, #{productCode}, #{orderId}, #{paymentKey}, #{amount}, #{plan}, #{creditAmount}, #{policySnapshotJson}, #{status})
mapper.select: SELECT id, user_id, provider, product_type, product_code, order_id, payment_key, amount, plan, credit_amount, policy_snapshot_json, status, paid_at, created_at FROM payment WHERE order_id = #{orderId}
mapper.update: UPDATE payment SET payment_key = #{paymentKey}, status = 'PAID', paid_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE order_id = #{orderId} AND status = 'READY'
